# 2025-12-17 — Wednesday

Slept poorly. Two coffees before noon — regret.

Priya pushed the pydantic bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Worked on the ruff pass. 0.78 is the right knob; 0.83 over-merged, 0.88 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Refactored httpx. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Watched the light on the Tejo from the office window. Forgot to work for ten minutes.

Mum called. She is fine. Father is fine. The dog is fine.

Tried the new bakery on Serra da Estrela. The pastel was underbaked.
